query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS proactive_insights (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  organization_id INT,
  client_id INT,
  category ENUM('compliance','portfolio','tax','engagement','spending','life_event') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'portfolio',
  priority ENUM('low','medium','high','critical') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium',
  title VARCHAR(256) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  suggested_action TEXT,
  status ENUM('new','viewed','acted','dismissed','snoozed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new',
  snooze_until DATETIME,
  acted_at DATETIME,
  dismissed_at DATETIME,
  metadata JSON,
  created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_insights_user (user_id),
  INDEX idx_insights_status (status),
  INDEX idx_insights_category (category),
  INDEX idx_insights_priority (priority)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS engagement_scores (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  client_id INT,
  organization_id INT,
  login_frequency DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0,
  meeting_cadence DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0,
  response_time_avg DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  portal_activity DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0,
  overall_score DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0,
  risk_level ENUM('healthy','at_risk','critical') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'healthy',
  period_start DATE,
  period_end DATE,
  created_at DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_engagement_user (user_id),
  INDEX idx_engagement_risk (risk_level)
);
